documentNo.reason: Internal sequential number — not relevant for users in simplified UI

product.reason: Not included in this iteration per UX feedback

summaryLevel.reason: Organization tree field not relevant in simplified UI

static.reason: Tree positioning field not relevant in simplified UI

everyMonthIs30Days.reason: Technical calculation detail — shown only when using Time-based depreciation

processed.reason: Create Amortization process button — rendered as process action, not a form field

fullyDepreciated.reason: Replaced by etgoAmortizationStatus — ISFULLYDEPRECIATED is no longer maintained

sEQNoAsset.reason: Auto-generated sequence number — users should not edit line numbering

disposalGain.reason: Advanced asset management feature — not in scope for simplified UI

disposalLoss.reason: Advanced asset management feature — not in scope for simplified UI

SL_Assets_Amortizationvalueamt.description: Recalculates depreciation amount on asset value changes
SL_Assets_Amortizationvalueamt.impactIfOmitted: No auto-recalculation when asset value is edited — users set amounts manually
SL_Assets_Amortizationvalueamt.reason: Source not found — cannot analyze effects safely

SL_Assets_Residualassetvalueamt.description: Recalculates fields when residual asset value changes
SL_Assets_Residualassetvalueamt.impactIfOmitted: No auto-recalculation on residual value changes
SL_Assets_Residualassetvalueamt.reason: Source not found — cannot analyze effects safely

SL_Assets_AssetValueAmt.description: Recalculates fields when asset value changes
SL_Assets_AssetValueAmt.impactIfOmitted: No auto-recalculation on asset value changes
SL_Assets_AssetValueAmt.reason: Source not found — cannot analyze effects safely

SL_Asset_Product_M_Product_ID.description: Auto-fills asset fields from selected product
SL_Asset_Product_M_Product_ID.impactIfOmitted: Product selection does not auto-populate asset details
SL_Asset_Product_M_Product_ID.reason: Source not found — cannot analyze effects safely

SL_Depreciate_A_Asset_Group_ID.description: Auto-fills depreciation configuration from selected asset category
SL_Depreciate_A_Asset_Group_ID.impactIfOmitted: Selecting asset category does not auto-populate depreciation type, calculate type, and amortize schedule — users must set them manually
SL_Depreciate_A_Asset_Group_ID.reason: Source not found — key UX behavior but cannot safely implement without source

AD_User_C_BPartner_User_Contacts.description: Filters user/contact selector by business partner
AD_User_C_BPartner_User_Contacts.impactIfOmitted: No impact — userContact field is system (not displayed)
AD_User_C_BPartner_User_Contacts.reason: Validation applies to a discarded/system field

C_BPartner_Location.description: Filters partner address by business partner
C_BPartner_Location.impactIfOmitted: No impact — partnerAddress field is system (not displayed)
C_BPartner_Location.reason: Validation applies to a system field

AD_Org_show_child_organizations.description: Filters organization selector to valid child orgs in the hierarchy
AD_Org_show_child_organizations.impactIfOmitted: Organization selector shows all orgs instead of the valid subset
AD_Org_show_child_organizations.reason: Simple SQL expression, standard Etendo org hierarchy pattern

readOnlyLogic_Currency_existAmortization.description: Currency becomes read-only once amortization lines exist
readOnlyLogic_Currency_existAmortization.impactIfOmitted: Users could change currency mid-process, corrupting amortization financial data
readOnlyLogic_Currency_existAmortization.reason: Critical data integrity rule — currency must be locked after depreciation schedule is created

readOnlyLogic_Processed_AmortizationLine.description: Amortization line fields lock (read-only) once the line is processed
readOnlyLogic_Processed_AmortizationLine.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit amortization amounts after accounting entries are posted
readOnlyLogic_Processed_AmortizationLine.reason: Standard document locking — processed records must not be modified

process_CreateAmortization.description: Generates amortization schedule entries based on the asset depreciation configuration
process_CreateAmortization.impactIfOmitted: No way to trigger depreciation schedule generation from the asset record
process_CreateAmortization.reason: Core feature — primary action of this window

process_GenerateAmortizationPlan.description: Generates or recalculates the full amortization plan
process_GenerateAmortizationPlan.impactIfOmitted: Cannot regenerate the plan after changing depreciation parameters
process_GenerateAmortizationPlan.reason: Secondary action for plan recalculation when asset config changes

process_Processing.description: Hardcoded processing flag — internal status column
process_Processing.reason: Internal mechanism, not a user-facing action
